blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,678 ft. Looking ahead, 49 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

Wednesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
